title: Menubar
description: A horizontal menu for application commands.

manual.title: Install dependencies
manual.description: Install the required dependencies for the menubar component.

manual.title: Add utility function
manual.description: Create a cn utility function if you don't have one already.

usage.import: import { Menubar, MenubarContent, MenubarItem, MenubarMenu, MenubarTrigger } from '@shery-ui/components';

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
import { Menubar, MenubarContent, MenubarItem, MenubarMenu, MenubarTrigger } from "@shery-ui/components";

export default function MenubarDemo() {
  return (
    <Menubar>
      <MenubarMenu>
        <MenubarTrigger>File</MenubarTrigger>
        <MenubarContent>
          <MenubarItem>New Tab</MenubarItem>
          <MenubarItem>Open</MenubarItem>
          <MenubarItem>Save</MenubarItem>
        </MenubarContent>
      </MenubarMenu>
      <MenubarMenu>
        <MenubarTrigger>Edit</MenubarTrigger>
        <MenubarContent>
          <MenubarItem>Undo</MenubarItem>
          <MenubarItem>Redo</MenubarItem>
        </MenubarContent>
      </MenubarMenu>
    </Menubar>
  );
}
